---
title: "Resume"
layout: page
toc: false
---

::: {.intro-eyebrow}
[]{.dot} CV & background
:::

[ Academic CV](./files/MiquelSirera_AcademicCV_Sep2025.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
[ Industry CV](./files/MiquelSireraPerelloPhDNEU_Sep2025.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

::: {.panel-tabset}

# Profile

I have a BSc in Data Science and Engineering from Universitat Politècnica de Catalunya, with a solid foundation in CS, math, statistics, and signal processing. I'm now doing a Ph.D. in Computer Engineering at Northeastern, focused on research that pushes things forward — especially in ML, distributed systems, and large language models. I like getting things shipped and aim for work that has real impact.

::: {.chips}
[Machine Learning]{.chip .is-primary}
[Large Language Models]{.chip}
[Distributed Systems]{.chip}
[Edge AI]{.chip}
[Wireless + AI]{.chip}
[PyTorch]{.chip}
[CUDA]{.chip}
[Python]{.chip}
[Linux]{.chip}
[MLOps]{.chip}
:::

# Education

::: {.timeline}

::: {.timeline-item}
[Jan 2024 — Present]{.ti-date}

#### PhD in Computer Engineering  {.ti-title .no-toc}

[Northeastern University · Boston]{.ti-place}

[At the intersection of ML, LLMs, distributed training and inference, and edge AI. Interested in making models more resilient and robust, in running AI efficiently on edge and cloud, and in how AI can improve telecom — network performance and automation. Especially curious about LLMs: attention, knowledge representation, and editing. Goal: build systems that are efficient, scalable, and reliable.]{.ti-body}
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
[Sep 2019 — Jul 2023]{.ti-date}

#### BSc in Data Science & Engineering  {.ti-title .no-toc}

[Universitat Politècnica de Catalunya · Barcelona]{.ti-place}

[Graduated with GPA 8.89/10. Honors in four courses: Discrete Mathematics & Logic, Mathematical Optimization, Search and Analysis of Information, and Advanced Topics of Data Science.]{.ti-body}
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
[Sep 2017 — Jun 2019]{.ti-date}

#### High School  {.ti-title .no-toc}

[La Salle Bonanova · Barcelona]{.ti-place}

[Graduated with honors. Scored 13.556/14 on the PAU university entrance exams and earned the PAU distinction. Math contests (Pangea, "Fem Matemàtiques") and extra math enrichment.]{.ti-body}
:::

:::

# Experience

::: {.timeline}

::: {.timeline-item}
[Feb 2023 — Jul 2023]{.ti-date}

#### BSc Thesis · Genesys Lab  {.ti-title .no-toc}

[Northeastern University · Institute for the Wireless Internet of Things]{.ti-place}

[Worked with a research team on AI for wireless communications. Designed and implemented AI-based approaches for signal classification. This work got me into AI + wireless and I've been here since.]{.ti-body}
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
[Mar 2022 — Dec 2022]{.ti-date}

#### AI Engineer Intern  {.ti-title .no-toc}

[Abi Global Health]{.ti-place}

[Internship at a global tele-health company. Improved monitoring in their MLOps setup and helped the AI Lab build new ML models and improve existing ones.]{.ti-body}
:::

:::

# Side projects

::: {.timeline}

::: {.timeline-item}
[2021 — Present]{.ti-date}

#### Datathons & hackathons  {.ti-title .no-toc}

[Various]{.ti-place}

[Done a bunch of datathons and hackathons — UPC Datathon and Google Hash Code (twice among others). Sharp problem-solving practice and good teamwork reps.]{.ti-body}
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
[Feb 2022 — Jun 2022]{.ti-date}

#### BECO · environmentally-conscious decisions  {.ti-title .no-toc}

[Naptilus Tech Lab]{.ti-place}

[Built a software product that used user data to help people reduce their carbon footprint. Shipped "BECO" — an app that used ML to suggest more sustainable options (e.g. eco-friendly places).]{.ti-body}
:::

:::

# Skills

I'm strong in problem-solving and critical thinking, and I work well in teams. I pick up new things quickly and I'm comfortable with change. I care about doing good work, I manage my time well, and I stay organized. That's how I get things done.

**Technical**

::: {.chips}
[Python]{.chip}
[PyTorch]{.chip}
[CUDA]{.chip}
[C/C++]{.chip}
[Git]{.chip}
[Linux]{.chip}
[Docker]{.chip}
[SLURM]{.chip}
[MLOps]{.chip}
[LaTeX]{.chip}
:::

**Languages**

::: {.chips}
[Catalan — Native]{.chip}
[Spanish — Native]{.chip}
[English — Fluent]{.chip}
:::

:::
